features.name: typedef enum with anonymous base type
features.description: Code should include a typedef enum declaration with an anonymous (implicit int) base type and multiple named constants assigned to a named type alias
features.snippet:
typedef enum {S0, S1, S2} state_t;
state_t state;

features.name: enum literal used in non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment that assigns a named enum literal (e.g., S0) to a variable of the corresponding enum type inside an always block

features.name: enum built-in method call next()
features.description: Code should include a call to the built-in SystemVerilog enum method next() on an enum-type variable, used as the right-hand side of a non-blocking assignment

features.name: always_ff with synchronous reset and enum state variable
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block sensitive to posedge clk that uses a synchronous reset to initialize an enum state variable, then advances it via a method call in the non-reset branch
